pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly creates the file at this path.
setup_task.sh downloads from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif, and gdalinfo confirms LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR.
Task description requires saving as '~/snap_exports/ml_training_data.csv', and export_result.sh specifically looks for it.
verifier.py explicitly fetches 'min_rows' from metadata to enforce the lower bound constraint.
verifier.py explicitly fetches 'max_rows' from metadata to enforce the upper bound constraint.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Landsat 7 TOA multi-spectral imagery downloaded from github.com/opengeos/data to '/home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif'. The output is expected to be exported as a CSV file to '/home/ga/snap_exports/ml_training_data.csv'. The expected row count of the extracted tabular dataset is bounded between 40,000 and 250,000, effectively validating the target 300x300 spatial subset which produces ~90,000 rows.
